Sanhedrin is the term used in the [[Church of Evolution]] to refer to regular governance meetings all members of a [[Pride]] are expected to participate in.

One will periodically "go to sanhedrin" instead of "go to church"

Going to sanhedrin serves the dual purpose of making decisions on [[firmlaw]] and legitimizing [[firmlaw]]. 

== Etymology ==
The name Sanhedrin is derived from the ancient Jewish Sanhedrin, which itself is derived from the Ancient Greek Synhedrion system.

The word is chosen as it describes well a union betwen direct democracy and religion. 

== Structure ==
Sanhedrins open up with an [[Sanhedrin Opening Ceremony|opening ceremony]]

Sanhedrins operate as a form of direct deliberative democracy. 

== History ==
Sanhedrins were first attempted in 2022

== See Also ==

* [[The Pride]]
* [[Jury]]
* [[Liquid Democracy]]
* [[Theodemocracy]]

[[Category:The Pride]]
[[Category:Sanhedrin]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
